text:
今のは機甲種……？
いや、反応が異なる。違うな。
では、これは何だというのだ……？

データが存在しないアンノウン……
境界でも越えて来た、とでも？
……はっ、まさかな。

……詳しい情報が必要だ。
帰還し、報告を行え。

Was that an Automata just now...? No, this
presence is different; it can't be that. So, then,
what could it be?

We have no data on this unknown presence.
Perhaps it crossed over into our territory?
Oh my, no way!

...We need detailed information.
Return and report your findings.
